title: English and History Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTE (.5 FTE History & .5 FTE English)Minimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary License with Language Arts or English EndorsementANDa History or Social Studies Composite Endorsement.  Spanish speaking preferred.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):Secondary Education Teacher.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
